high_conviction.description: Adding to loser OR reducing + notional >$25M

strategy.name: Counter-Trade Strategy (Expert Panel Validated)
strategy.description: Analyzed by ML expert, quant trader, and risk critic using 575,138 fills over 216 days. Daily counter WR is ~51% (coin flip) but +40% return from asymmetric payoffs. The entire return concentrates in ~10 extreme loss days. ML model cannot predict WHICH day blows up, but identifies behavioral setups that precede blowups.

rules.reason: 76% WR when he exits at a loss (quant finding)

rules.condition: Adding to losers 3+ days + BTC down
rules.reason: Behavioral distress + market against him (ML + quant)
21% counter WR on BTC up days (quant finding)
Must stay positioned for unpredictable blowup days

key_findings: Daily counter WR: 50.9% (near coin flip). Edge is from payoff asymmetry.
Top 10 loss days = $-63,957,977 (105% of total). Remove them and strategy LOSES $-3,076,543.
10,820 liquidation fills. Only 13% of losses from liquidations (critic).
ML model AUC ~0.50 for timing. Cannot predict which day blows up.
ML CAN identify behavioral setup: large position + consecutive adds + PUMP losses + night trading.
Magnitude filter: trade 28/216 days, Sharpe 10.7, 94% less drawdown (ML finding).
BTC direction is strongest real-time signal: down >0.5% = 73% WR, up >0.5% = 21% WR (quant).
When he reduces positions: 76% WR, avg $1M counter profit (quant).
This is N=1 - one trader, one dataset. Does not generalize (critic).

panel_verdict.ml_expert: Cannot predict timing (AUC 0.50) but behavioral features improve Sharpe from 4.6 to 10.7 via filtering.
panel_verdict.quant_trader: BTC direction + his reducing = strongest signals. Score 4+ days: 91% WR. Optimal: 10% notional on $5M capital.
panel_verdict.critic: Remove top 10 days = negative. N=1 wallet. Oct 2025 is 52% of returns. This is a blowup bet, not a systematic strategy.
panel_verdict.consensus: Real but fragile edge. Use behavioral filters to select days. Size small. Accept most days are coin flips. The return comes from being positioned for rare catastrophic events.

strategy.disclaimer: Research study by ML expert, quant trader, and risk critic agents. Not financial advice. Win rate is near 50%. Entire return concentrates in ~10 extreme days. N=1 trader - does not generalize. Significant risk of loss. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
